name: Standard Crit
description: The reliable carry path. Essence Reaver and Navori keep Q on a near-permanent cooldown while Infinity Edge turns every auto and Q into a crit.

name: On-Hit
description: Trinity proc plus stacked on-hit effects. Blade, Kraken, Terminus and Wit's End make every basic bite, with Rageblade amplifying the whole package.

name: Permafrost
description: The ultimate slow build. Rylai's, Iceborn, Frozen Heart, Dead Man's and Randuin's mean nothing within range ever moves at full speed again. Pure menace, zero meta.
